xEnrich 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Reference

All functions

build_tissue_sets()

Build the expressed-gene sets used internally by enrich_by_hpa

classify_assoc_selection()

Classify selected pathways by signal strength and independence

classify_gsea_selection()

Classify selected pathways after GSEA-based redundancy selection

compute_pathway_activity()

Compute per-sample pathway activity scores

enrich_by_hpa()

Group-wise RNA Expression Enrichment Analysis

enrich_by_hpa_ihc()

Group-wise IHC Enrichment Analysis

enrich_by_tabula()

Cell-type enrichment analysis using Tabula Sapiens scRNA data

load_reference()

Load reference datasets from Zenodo cache

plot_gains()

Plot conditional MI gains from run_redundancy_selection

print(<xEnrich_pipeline>)

Print method for xEnrich_pipeline

run_assoc_pcor_selection()

Non-redundant pathway selection via partial correlation

run_assoc_redundancy_selection()

Non-redundant pathway selection after association analysis via sample-space conditional mutual information

run_batch_gsea()

Run GSEA across a collection of gene sets

run_enrichment()

Run enrichment analysis: hypergeometric test or GSEA-like scoring

run_gsea_redundancy_selection()

Non-redundant pathway selection after GSEA via leading-edge CMI

run_info_assoc()

Pathway-phenotype association via mutual information

run_info_enrichment()

Run enrichment analysis using information theory

run_location_pipeline()

Location-aware enrichment pipeline

run_redundancy_selection()

Greedy non-redundant pathway selection via conditional mutual information

summarize_expression()

Summarise expression distribution of a reference data frame

summarize_selection()

Decompose phenotype variance across selected pathways

summary(<xEnrich_pipeline>)

Summary method for xEnrich_pipeline

xEnrich xEnrich-package

xEnrich: Multi-Scale Enrichment with Information Theory and Location Context

Contents

Developed by Artur Shvetcov.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
